# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Handlers } from "https://deno.land/x/fresh@1.6.3/server.ts";

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age?: number;
  city?: string;
}

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

// Helper to sanitize key parts
function sanitizeKeyPart(part: unknown): string | number | boolean {
  if (typeof part === 'string') {
    return part.trim().toLowerCase();
  }
  return part as string | number | boolean;
}

export const handler: Handlers = {
  async GET(req) {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const params = new URLSearchParams(url.search);

    const baseKey: (string | number | boolean)[] = ['users'];
    const filterCriteria: Record<string, string> = {};

    // Dynamic key construction and filter criteria collection
    for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
      if (key === 'id') {
        baseKey.push(sanitizeKeyPart(value));
      } else {
        filterCriteria[key] = value;
      }
    }

    const users: User[] = [];
    let listIterator: Deno.KvListIterator<User>;

    // If 'id' is present, fetch a specific user
    if (baseKey.length > 1) {
      const entry = await kv.get<User>(baseKey);
      if (entry.value) {
        users.push(entry.value);
      }
    } else {
      // Otherwise, iterate through all users
      listIterator = kv.list<User>({ prefix: baseKey });

      for await (const entry of listIterator) {
        users.push(entry.value);
      }
    }

    // Apply additional filters from query parameters
    const filteredUsers = users.filter(user => {
      for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(filterCriteria)) {
        const userValue = (user as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
        if (typeof userValue === 'string') {
          if (!userValue.toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase())) {
            return false;
          }
        } else if (userValue !== undefined && String(userValue) !== value) {
          // For non-string fields, perform exact match
          return false;
        }
      }
      return true;
    });

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(filteredUsers), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      status: 200,
    });
  },

  async POST(req) {
    try {
      const user: User = await req.json();
      if (!user.id || !user.name || !user.email) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Missing required fields: id, name, email" }), {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          status: 400,
        });
      }

      const key = ['users', sanitizeKeyPart(user.id)];
      const check = await kv.get<User>(key);
      if (check.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User with this ID already exists" }), {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          status: 409, // Conflict
        });
      }

      await kv.set(key, user);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(user), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        status: 201, // Created
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        status: 500,
      });
    }
  },

  async PUT(req) {
    try {
      const user: User = await req.json();
      if (!user.id) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User ID is required for update" }), {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          status: 400,
        });
      }

      const key = ['users', sanitizeKeyPart(user.id)];
      const existingUser = await kv.get<User>(key);

      if (!existingUser.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: `User with ID '${user.id}' not found` }), {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          status: 404,
        });
      }

      // Merge existing data with new data
      const updatedUser = { ...existingUser.value, ...user };
      await kv.set(key, updatedUser);

      return new Response(JSON.stringify(updatedUser), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        status: 200,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        status: 500,
      });
    }
  },

  async DELETE(req) {
    try {
      const url = new URL(req.url);
      const userId = url.searchParams.get("id");

      if (!userId) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User ID is required for deletion" }), {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          status: 400,
        });
      }

      const key = ['users', sanitizeKeyPart(userId)];
      const existingUser = await kv.get<User>(key);

      if (!existingUser.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: `User with ID '${userId}' not found` }), {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          status: 404,
        });
      }

      await kv.delete(key);

      return new Response(null, { status: 204 }); // No Content
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        status: 500,
      });
    }
  },
};
